data.name: TXT_0313D4F4
data.value: View cleanup/repair progress and results here.

data.name: TXT_09896705
data.value: Switch channels and update to target build

data.name: TXT_10BCF11A
data.value: Teams reset and cache cleanup completed.

data.name: TXT_13CDC0B9
data.value:
Teams sign-in cleanup completed.
Please restart your PC before opening New Teams again.

data.name: TXT_1520175C
data.value: Reset Teams cache/sign-in and repair meeting add-in

data.name: TXT_1C93B412
data.value: Reset new Teams and clear local cache without affecting cloud chats/files.

data.name: TXT_1F08F9DC
data.value: This will clear 21V portal verification status. Continue?

data.name: TXT_2D36E63D
data.value: Deleting Teams sign-in records, please wait...

data.name: TXT_2EE53603
data.value: Run Outlook scan in compatibility mode. If Outlook is not running, it should fall back to offline scan.

data.name: TXT_316B4622
data.value: Run official Microsoft cleanup tool to remove Office activation remnants, WAM account and WPJ traces.

data.name: TXT_367DFD6B
data.value: No uninstall log folder is available yet.

data.name: TXT_3E217155
data.value: Clear local sign-in records. Restart PC before opening New Teams again.

data.name: TXT_42869F03
data.value: View Outlook scan results, return codes and log folder here.

data.name: TXT_478F09F0
data.value: Uninstall did not fully complete. Please review the result details.

data.name: TXT_4804153A
data.value: Diagnostics action completed. Please review details.

data.name: TXT_48A2A406
data.value: Running Outlook offline scan, please wait...

data.name: TXT_4A155788
data.value: Use SaRA All mode to remove all installed Office versions.

data.name: TXT_4CC3B385
data.value: Please select an uninstall target first.

data.name: TXT_4DB33EDB
data.value: No version list was retrieved for this channel.

data.name: TXT_50651CE3
data.value: Run comprehensive scan for Outlook, Office and Windows, and generate diagnostics report.

data.name: TXT_5445208A
data.value: Repairing Outlook Teams meeting add-in, please wait...

data.name: TXT_55B7B32F
data.value: Use official Microsoft tool to uninstall Office with logs

data.name: TXT_561A73A8
data.value:
This will:
1. Close running Teams processes 2. Reset new Teams app 3. Clear local Teams cache
Cloud data remains intact. Continue?

data.name: TXT_570A963B
data.value: Running Outlook calendar scan, please wait...

data.name: TXT_5FEECD19
data.value: Teams processing completed. Please review details.

data.name: TXT_628F6668
data.value: Run official Microsoft Get Help scenario to repair Teams Meeting Add-in in Outlook.

data.name: TXT_638056A2
data.value: For new Teams only: reset/clear cache, remove local sign-in records, and repair Outlook Teams meeting add-in.

data.name: TXT_63FF4A6D
data.value: Let Microsoft SaRA auto-detect installed Office versions and attempt uninstall. If multiple versions exist, SaRA returns multi-version result codes.

data.name: TXT_67936359
data.value:
This removes local sign-in records and clears required folders. Cloud data remains safe, but you must restart the computer before opening New Teams again.
Continue?

data.name: TXT_67AA5312
data.value: Office update channel switch completed and Office update UI has been launched.

data.name: TXT_6995EC0C
data.value: Office ClickToRun client was not detected.

data.name: TXT_6A7A9025
data.value: Are you sure to clean activation info? This runs official Microsoft cleanup tool. Close Office first.

data.name: TXT_76840890
data.value: Please select a target channel first.

data.name: TXT_77D9476A
data.value: Running Outlook full scan, please wait...

data.name: TXT_7FA11407
data.value: Repair action executed. Please review details.

data.name: TXT_7FA7C752
data.value:
This runs official Microsoft Get Help scenario to scan Outlook calendar issues via CalCheck.
Continue?

data.name: TXT_8EF39016
data.value: Run activation cleanup and network/activation environment repair for common Microsoft 365 activation issues.

data.name: TXT_9A7E63A2
data.value: Configure language and 21V portal verification status.

data.name: TXT_9D3789E2
data.value: Outlook Teams meeting add-in repair completed. Restart Outlook to verify.

data.name: TXT_A02CECEB
data.value: Are you sure to repair network/activation environment? This modifies proxy and Internet Settings.

data.name: TXT_A6C0AB34
data.value: View Teams results, closed processes, processed folders and next-step suggestions here.

data.name: TXT_A7A6B81C
data.value: Repair IE/WinHTTP settings and proxy to restore network prerequisites for Office activation.

data.name: TXT_B11CBAB7
data.value: Please complete 21V portal verification before using other pages.

data.name: TXT_B677DDFA
data.value: Run Outlook scans and generate diagnostics reports

data.name: TXT_B82858D4
data.value: No Outlook diagnostics log folder is available yet.

data.name: TXT_BD38521C
data.value: Uninstall subscription Office, such as Microsoft 365 Apps for enterprise / business.

data.name: TXT_C28C66D0
data.value: Office uninstall completed. You can open the log folder.

data.name: TXT_C8150551
data.value: View channel switch status, target version, and execution results here.

data.name: TXT_CD9A49F4
data.value: Open new Teams cache folder for manual inspection.

data.name: TXT_D2B4DFD2
data.value: Clean activation remnants and account traces

data.name: TXT_D475DC02
data.value: View uninstall results, return code, process summary and next-step suggestions here.

data.name: TXT_DE903B3C
data.value: 21V portal verification is required to use this tool.

data.name: TXT_E02379A1
data.value: Outlook diagnostics completed. You can open the report folder.

data.name: TXT_E4A9DBBE
data.value:
This runs official Microsoft Get Help scenario for full Outlook scan and diagnostics report.
Continue?

data.name: TXT_E83ACCAD
data.value: Switch Office update channel, and choose latest or fixed version to trigger update.

data.name: TXT_EB22D76F
data.value:
This runs official Microsoft Get Help scenario to repair Teams Meeting Add-in in Outlook. Outlook may be closed during execution.
Continue?

data.name: TXT_EFA2E7BB
data.value: Use official Microsoft SaRA Office Uninstall scenario to uninstall target version and keep logs.

data.name: TXT_F36FC0DC
data.value: Installation result and logs will be shown here

data.name: TXT_F690C889
data.value: Use CalCheck to scan known issues in Outlook calendar and generate results.

data.name: TXT_F7567DDA
data.value: Choose product, architecture and channel, then run online installation and environment checks

data.name: TXT_F79F4B3F
data.value:
This runs official Microsoft Get Help scenario in compatibility mode.
Continue?

data.name: TXT_F7EF9B3E
data.value: Install M365 Apps, Project, or Visio online

data.name: TXT_FE6125A8
data.value: Run Microsoft Get Help scenarios for Outlook full scan, offline scan and calendar scan.
